description: Feature flags, usage limits, and overage pricing per plan

category.description: Feature category for grouping in pricing UI

enterprise_value.description: Enterprise plan value (number for limits, true/false for features, unlimited for Infinity)

key.description: Dot-notation key used in hasFeature() and getPlanLimit() (e.g. cdn.delivery, ai.messages_per_month)

overage_price.description: Per-unit overage price in USD (null if not applicable)

overage_unit.description: Overage billing unit (e.g. per message, per GB, per submission)

type.description: Whether this entry is a boolean feature flag or a numeric limit

name: Plan Features
